llvm::function_ref< Fn > Class Template Reference
Inheritance diagram for llvm::function_ref< Fn >:
[legend]

Detailed Description

template<typename Fn>
class llvm::function_ref< Fn >

An efficient, type-erasing, non-owning reference to a callable. This is intended for use as the type of a function parameter that is not used after the function in question returns.

This class does not own the callable, so it is not in general safe to store a function_ref.
